recommendations.title: I Want You
recommendations.overview: A macho type man becomes entangled with an independent-minded girl.

recommendations.title: Shattered
recommendations.overview: Chris, a wealthy divorcee, lives in a high-tech house of his own design in Montana. His life changes when he meets Sky, a mysterious young woman who draws him out of his shell and moves in after Chris is injured.

recommendations.title: Pusher

recommendations.title: Extraction
recommendations.overview: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son.

recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Ransom
recommendations.overview: When a rich man's son is kidnapped, he cooperates with the police at first but then tries a unique tactic against the criminals.

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.

recommendations.title: Heroic Losers

recommendations.title: Furie
recommendations.overview: When a little girl is kidnapped by a trafficking ring, they soon find they messed with the wrong child. Her mother, a notorious former gang leader, is close on their trail and will go to any lengths to bring her child home.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.
